story.title: Recovery
story.logline: A doctor must navigate the complexities of a patient's recovery after a life-altering accident, while confronting the dark secrets of their own past.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: We meet Dr. Ryder, a skilled but emotionally guarded doctor, as he checks in on his patient, Sofia Rosa, a young woman recovering from a severe accident. Sofia's injury has left her with memory loss and a deep sense of unease. As Dr. Ryder tries to connect with Sofia, we glimpse his own troubled past.

acts.label: Rising Action
acts.description: As Sofia's memories begin to return, she reveals a shocking truth about Dr. Ryder's past, forcing him to confront the secrets he's kept hidden for so long. Meanwhile, a mysterious nurse, Natalia, seems to be watching Dr. Ryder with an air of suspicion.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: As tensions between Dr. Ryder and Sofia come to a head, he must make a choice between his duty as a doctor and his loyalty to his patient. Meanwhile, Natalia's true motives are revealed, adding a new layer of complexity to the story.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: In the aftermath of the confrontation, Dr. Ryder must pick up the pieces and find a way to heal not only his patient but also himself. As Sofia begins to rebuild her life, Dr. Ryder finally finds the courage to confront his own demons.

story.protagonist: Dr. Ryder, a skilled but emotionally guarded doctor
story.world: The world of the story is one where the past and present collide, where secrets and lies can have devastating consequences.
